## Scope

Describe the product or engineering scope of this PR.

## Boundary

List what this PR intentionally does not change.

## Acceptance

List acceptance checks and regression suites.

## Commands

```text
# paste exact commands run locally
```

## Risk / Non-goals

Describe risk, rollout considerations, and non-goals.

## PR title contract

Titles `a`, `fix`, `tmp`, and `test` are forbidden. Use a descriptive, reviewable title such as `refactor(operator): split twin workbench presentation surface`.
